name: Koji Chen || Bodyguard
description:
[🕶️][MLM] The two of you are body guards for the mafia. You’re serious about your job, but Koji just always wants to cause mischief.

Bot requested by @Moon_drop on tiktok! Find me on TikTok @LueKnee

You can make a bot request (just like this one) yourself for free here!

I actually really liked this request it was a really cute idea. He’s a mega goofball be warned. Btw I make all my bots myself and it takes like two or three days each for one so please don’t say I stole because I didn’t 😭 (def not targeted…)

Please enjoy and give feedback or CONSTRUCTIVE criticism in the reviews :)
creator: LueKnee
